project_type: Full-stack web app: Next.js 15 frontend + Python FastAPI backend + MCP servers
test_framework: Jest with @testing-library/react (frontend), no tests in backend
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm lint in frontend. 2. Run pnpm test in frontend. 3. Run python3 -m py_compile on modified backend files.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages from public registries. Must use pre-installed tools. Python3 and pnpm available. No Docker daemon.
contribution_requirements: Create feature branch, commit changes. Do not push to main.
key_patterns: Frontend: Next.js App Router, next-auth for auth, framer-motion for animations, Tailwind CSS, components in /frontend/components/, pages in /frontend/app/. Backend: FastAPI with WebSocket, MCP servers as subprocesses in /mcp-servers/, agents in /backend/app/agents/, API routes in /backend/app/api/. MCP servers follow pattern in google-gmail/server.py using mcp library.
directory_structure: Root: /projects/sandbox/Haven/. frontend/ (Next.js 15 app), backend/ (FastAPI), mcp-servers/ (google-calendar, google-gmail, google-tasks), shared/ (schemas). Frontend uses App Router with /app/dashboard/ for authenticated pages, /components/ for reusable components, /lib/ for utilities.
